alerts.title: OKR onboarding not yet done
alerts.body:
CoS cannot prioritise tasks without defined OKRs.
This is the most critical first step before the GTD layer can work.
→ Schedule an OKR session with Alexander when ready for Milestone 5.

upcoming.title: Milestone 3: Monitoring Agent — system health + Telegram alerts
Milestone 5: OKR onboarding — define goals before GTD layer activates
Milestone 4: Comms Router — Gmail/WhatsApp → SQLite bus
Milestone 6: School Agent — first domain agent
